mapper.select: SELECT o.access_token FROM oauth_token as o JOIN tokens as t USING (oauth_id) where t.access_token = #{jwtAccessToken};

SELECT p.repo_id, p.pr_id, p.user_id, p.temp_status FROM pr_temp AS p JOIN repository_member AS re ON p.repo_id = re.repo_id JOIN oauth_token AS o ON re.user_id = o.user_id WHERE o.access_token = #{accessToken} AND p.temp_status = 0;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pr_temp (repo_id, pr_id, user_id, temp_status) VALUES (#{repoId}, #{prId}, #{userId}, #{tempStatus});
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT c.repo_id, c.pr_id, c.temp_status FROM comment_temp AS c JOIN repository_member AS re ON c.repo_id = re.repo_id JOIN oauth_token AS o ON re.user_id = o.user_id WHERE o.access_token = #{accessToken} AND c.temp_status = 0;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment_temp (repo_id, pr_id, user_id, temp_status) VALUES (#{repoId}, #{prId}, #{userId}, #{tempStatus});
